Barbarian Spiritist`s Hammer  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 43
DMG: 22 Dmg Bonus: 150
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +13 INT: +13
Effect: Winter's Roar (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 30
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: SHM
Race: BAR
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Usable
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2003 at 4:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591753634560
10 posts
I was hoping to find a high procing 1 or 2 hb weapon for my Vah Shir. Something like this hammer. As you may see the Allakazam search advises it is usable by Vah Shir while the weapon description sticks with Barb only. As Vah Shir have to respond like Barbs during our Epic adventures is there any chance anyone knows if a Vah Shir can use this weapon and get the procs??

Not only now will it drop off of Dread and CT....I snagged it last night off of Fright. Haven't seen it for sale too much, but usually when I do it's around 10k or so.

60 Oracle
AB
▲ Page top
Love this weapon!
QuoteReply
# Jan 05 2003 at 1:20 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591780217532
13 posts
I bought this beauty at lvl 30 for 1k in bazaar[vallon zek] after doing some research into what weapon I should look for on this site. It's been the best investment imaginable! With my haste item [silver chitin hand wraps] and my own haste spell I swing this bad boy quite quickly, the fact that it procs like crazy usually at least once up to 5 times in a fight has saved lives and amazed the people I group with countless times. [I don't have uber dex gear, just what my spells give me and a little here and there]

The way I looked at it was that I'm never gonna do much damage without a proc weapon, we just aren't made for it...so I went with a proc weapon and this doesn't dissapoint, doing 263dd most times except in velious where its greatly reduced [cold resist mobs] It's got nice wis on it so I don't miss not having a wis item too much if I was using a 1h weapon.

I usually have KEI/c3 going when I play so my mana is usually quite high when I group so I can wade in after I do my slows etc and lend a hand in melee....this wepn rocks buy one!

PS If you want a great standby 1h weapon check out the Rune Etched Iceworm Fang it's great too but doesnt proc as often or as much damage as my BSH but sometimes when doing pvp I want the extra magic resists [from shield]etc and weapon speed to disrupt casters.

Hope that was helpful.

Wrynn 48 Seasons
Vallon Zek
▲ Page top

# Aug 22 2001 at 6:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752435549
2 posts
This weapon does proc at lvl 30. I won one in Fear about a month ago and threw it on my Shaman and its been procing like wildfire since 30. Hitting for about 253 dmg at 35, its one of the best shaman twinking weapons out there.

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 24 2001 at 2:45 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) What I want to know is at what lvl does it proc at? I was told that it was lvl 30 by a player that was trying to sell one, but everyone knows how reliable people are when they are trying to sell an item. "Oh by the way it will give you plus 50 to every stat, and make you run a speed faster than SoW, and even give you an extra 1000hp when it procs! Plus on top of all of that it procs on almost every hit! Only 10k SO BUY IT NOW! please =)." Please people don't lie about a weapon just to get rid of it, don't you think that the majority of use see through the bull $#!T.
#Anonymous, Posted: Dec 23 2000 at 2:47 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) this drops from Lady Vox in permafrost....
